auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: CompanyCam access token used with the Authorization: Bearer header. Generate or view access tokens in the CompanyCam app: https://app.companycam.com/access_tokens.

actions.name: archive_project
actions.description: Archive a CompanyCam project by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for archiving a CompanyCam project.

anyOf.description: The ID of the entity that created the project.
The type of entity that created the project.
The display name of the entity that created the project.
The project status returned by CompanyCam.
The project URL in the CompanyCam web app.
The public slug used in some CompanyCam URLs.
Whether the project timeline and public features are enabled.
The Unix timestamp when the project was created.
The Unix timestamp when the project was updated.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when archiving a CompanyCam project.

actions.name: create_project
actions.description: Create a CompanyCam project with optional address, coordinates, and contact data.

address.description: The address fields to send to CompanyCam.

primaryContact.description: The primary contact fields to send to CompanyCam.

currentUserEmail.description: The CompanyCam user email to send in the X-CompanyCam-User header.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a CompanyCam project.

anyOf.description: The ID of the entity that created the project.
The type of entity that created the project.
The display name of the entity that created the project.
The project status returned by CompanyCam.
The project URL in the CompanyCam web app.
The public slug used in some CompanyCam URLs.
Whether the project timeline and public features are enabled.
The Unix timestamp when the project was created.
The Unix timestamp when the project was updated.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a CompanyCam project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a CompanyCam tag.

anyOf.description: The normalized tag value used for searching and sorting.
The Unix timestamp when the tag was created.
The Unix timestamp when the tag was updated.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a CompanyCam tag.

actions.name: delete_tag
actions.description: Delete a CompanyCam tag by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a CompanyCam tag.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when deleting a CompanyCam tag.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Retrieve the CompanyCam company associated with the API token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving the CompanyCam company.

anyOf.description: The company status returned by CompanyCam.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving the CompanyCam company.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Retrieve the current CompanyCam user associated with the API token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving the current CompanyCam user.

anyOf.description: The user status returned by CompanyCam.
The Unix timestamp when the user was created.
The Unix timestamp when the user was updated.
The user URL in the CompanyCam web app.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving the current CompanyCam user.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Retrieve one CompanyCam project by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one CompanyCam project.

anyOf.description: The ID of the entity that created the project.
The type of entity that created the project.
The display name of the entity that created the project.
The project status returned by CompanyCam.
The project URL in the CompanyCam web app.
The public slug used in some CompanyCam URLs.
Whether the project timeline and public features are enabled.
The Unix timestamp when the project was created.
The Unix timestamp when the project was updated.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving one CompanyCam project.

actions.name: get_tag
actions.description: Retrieve one CompanyCam tag by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one CompanyCam tag.

anyOf.description: The normalized tag value used for searching and sorting.
The Unix timestamp when the tag was created.
The Unix timestamp when the tag was updated.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving one CompanyCam tag.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Retrieve one CompanyCam user by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one CompanyCam user.

anyOf.description: The user status returned by CompanyCam.
The Unix timestamp when the user was created.
The Unix timestamp when the user was updated.
The user URL in the CompanyCam web app.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving one CompanyCam user.

actions.name: list_projects
actions.description: List CompanyCam projects with optional name, address, and modified-since filters.

perPage.description: The number of records to return per page.

query.description: Filter projects by name or the first address line.

modifiedSince.description: Return projects modified on or after this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing CompanyCam projects.

anyOf.description: The ID of the entity that created the project.
The type of entity that created the project.
The display name of the entity that created the project.
The project status returned by CompanyCam.
The project URL in the CompanyCam web app.
The public slug used in some CompanyCam URLs.
Whether the project timeline and public features are enabled.
The Unix timestamp when the project was created.
The Unix timestamp when the project was updated.

projects.description: The CompanyCam projects returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing CompanyCam projects.

actions.name: list_tags
actions.description: List CompanyCam tags visible to the API token.

perPage.description: The number of records to return per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing CompanyCam tags.

anyOf.description: The normalized tag value used for searching and sorting.
The Unix timestamp when the tag was created.
The Unix timestamp when the tag was updated.

tags.description: The CompanyCam tags returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing CompanyCam tags.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List CompanyCam users visible to the API token.

perPage.description: The number of records to return per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing CompanyCam users.

anyOf.description: The user status returned by CompanyCam.
The Unix timestamp when the user was created.
The Unix timestamp when the user was updated.
The user URL in the CompanyCam web app.

users.description: The CompanyCam users returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing CompanyCam users.

The Unix timestamp when the project was updated.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when restoring a CompanyCam project.
